search.noResultsHint: Shorten your search or clear filters.

detail.lastRecommendEmptyHint: Tap Get recommendation below to see your custom settings.

targetMuscleRequired: Please choose a target muscle first.

recommendation.title: Recommended Settings
recommendation.emptySettings: No setting data available for this machine.
recommendation.duplicate: You already have a recommendation for this muscle today. Check Records, or pick another muscle.
recommendation.duplicateMachine: You already have a recommendation for this machine today. Open it from Records.

workoutLog.title: Workout log
workoutLog.updated: Your workout log changes are saved.
workoutLog.loginRequired: Sign in to save your sets and weights.
workoutLog.selectGymToLog: Select a specific gym to save your workout log.

restTimer.label: Rest after set {{setNumber}}
restTimer.notificationBody: Set {{setNumber}} rest is over. Ready for the next set!

voiceCoach.title: Voice count
voiceCoach.desc: Countdown before the set, then spoken rep counting.
voiceCoach.statusIdle: Ready — tap start or auto-start after rest.

feedback.title: How did the settings fit?
feedback.desc: Your feedback helps improve future recommendations.
feedback.savedGood: Thanks for the feedback — we'll keep refining your recommendations.
feedback.savedBad: No worries. Adjust the values next to each recommendation.
feedback.customDesc: Save custom values for this machine.
feedback.preferencesSaveFailed: Couldn't save your preferences. Please try again in a moment.

history.subtitle: Your recent recommendation history
history.empty: No history yet. Get a recommendation first!
history.emptySaved: No recommendations with saved workout logs.
history.emptyUnsaved: No recommendations without saved workout logs.
history.emptyOnDate: No records on the selected date.
history.calendarHint: Only dotted dates have history records.
history.deleteMessage: Delete this recommendation record? Linked workout logs will also be removed and cannot be restored.
history.personalTipPlaceholder: Record your personal tips for this machine.
history.personalTipSaveFailed: Workout log saved. Please try saving your personal tip again.
history.personalTipSaveHint: Saved together with your workout diary via Save below.

profileContext.title: Profile
profileContext.description: Based on gender {{gender}}, height {{heightCm}} cm, weight {{weightKg}} kg, experience {{experienceLevel}}.

profileFormula.title: Body weight & experience estimate
profileFormula.description: Reference weight from body weight {{weightKg}} kg × experience factor {{multiplier}} × 0.5.

bodyReference.title: Body-based reference (growth analysis)
bodyReference.description: Body reference weight from weight {{weightKg}} kg, gender {{gender}}, experience {{experienceLevel}}.

machineSettingMatch.title: Matched machine setting
machineSettingMatch.description: Machine setting weight for gender {{gender}}, experience {{experienceLevel}}, height {{heightCm}} cm.

machineReferenceDb.title: DB reference weight
machineReferenceDb.description: Reference weight from machine settings DB for the same profile range.

personalRecord.title: Personal record (PR)
personalRecord.description: Max set weight across {{workoutCount}} logged sessions on this machine.

lastSessionMax.title: Last session max weight
lastSessionMax.description: Max set weight from your most recent workout log.

avgSessionVolume.title: Average session volume
avgSessionVolume.description: Average total set weight across {{workoutCount}} logged sessions.

volumeGrowth.title: Volume growth rate
volumeGrowth.description: Volume change from first to latest log: {{pct}}%.

cohortAvgMax.title: Similar cohort average
cohortAvgMax.description: Average max weight of {{sampleSize}} users with similar height, weight class, gender, and experience (height {{heightMinCm}}–{{heightMaxCm}} cm).

progressiveTarget.title: Progressive overload target
progressiveTarget.description: Next-step target based on recent max {{baseKg}} kg.

growthNextTarget.title: Growth analysis next target
growthNextTarget.description: Next target from growth analysis based on PR {{baseKg}} kg.

blendedSelection.title: Blended from multiple sources
blendedSelection.description: No workout logs yet; final weight is the average of {{count}} reference values.
